```{r}
#   st_drop_geometry() |> 
#   mutate(
#     DateLabel = as.Date(DOY, origin = as.Date("1999-12-31")),  # Adjust origin year as needed
#     MonthDay = format(DateLabel, "%B %d")
#   ) |> 
#   distinct(DOY, DateLabel, MonthDay) |> 
#   arrange(DOY)
# 
# # Create a temporary directory for frames
# tmp_dir <- tempfile("combined_frames_")
# dir.create(tmp_dir)
# 
# # Get all unique sites for each watershed
# watershed_sites <- daily_map |> 
#   st_drop_geometry() |> 
#   distinct(watershed, siteId) |> 
#   group_by(watershed) |> 
#   summarise(sites = list(siteId))
# 
# # Function to create a single combined frame with one shared legend
# create_single_frame <- function(i, all_days, daily_map, allStreams, watershed_sites, tmp_dir) {
#   library(tidyverse)
#   library(sf)
#   library(patchwork)
#   library(grid)
#   
#   current_day <- all_days$DOY[i]
#   day_label <- all_days$MonthDay[i]
#   
#   day_data <- daily_map |> 
#     filter(DOY == current_day)
#   
#   # Create a list of plots for each watershed (WITHOUT LEGENDS)
#   plot_list <- map(watershed_sites$watershed, function(ws) {
#     ws_day_data <- day_data |> 
#       filter(watershed == ws) |> 
#       complete(siteId = watershed_sites$sites[[which(watershed_sites$watershed == ws)]]) |> 
#       sf::st_as_sf()
#     
#     ws_stream <- allStreams |> 
#       filter(watershed == ws)
#     
#     ggplot() +
#       geom_sf(data = ws_stream, color = "#0084A8", size = 0.8) +
#       geom_sf(data = ws_day_data |> filter(!is.na(wet_dry)),
#               aes(color = wet_dry), size = 3, show.legend = TRUE) +  # Ensure color mapping is consistent
#       geom_sf(data = ws_day_data |> filter(is.na(wet_dry)),
#               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "gray50") +
#       scale_color_manual(values = c("Dry" = "#D55E00", "Wet" = "#009E73"),
#                         drop = FALSE, name = "Status") +  # Name for the legend
#       labs(title = ws) +
#       theme_void() +
#       theme(
#         plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
#         legend.position = "none"  # Remove individual legends
#       )
#   })
#   
#   # Combine plots into a 2x3 grid and collect legends
#   combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, nrow = 2, ncol = 3, guides = "collect") +
#     plot_annotation(
#       subtitle = day_label,
#       theme = theme(
#         plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
#         legend.position = "bottom",  # Single legend at bottom
#         legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
#         legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
#       )
#     )
#   
#   # Save the frame
#   png_file <- file.path(tmp_dir, sprintf("frame_%03d.png", i))
#   ggsave(png_file, combined_plot, width = 18, height = 12, dpi = 310, units = "in")
#   
#   return(png_file)
# }
# 
# # Generate all frames in parallel with progress bar
# message("Creating combined frames in parallel...")
# png_files <- suppressWarnings(future_map(seq_len(nrow(all_days)),
#                        ~create_single_frame(.x, all_days, daily_map, allStreams, watershed_sites, tmp_dir),
#                        .options = furrr_options(
#                          seed = TRUE,
#                          packages = c("tidyverse", "sf", "patchwork", "ggthemes")
#                        ),
#                        .progress = TRUE)
#                        )
# 
# # Combine frames into GIF
# output_gif <- here("Figs/STICs/gifs/allSheds.gif")
# gifski::gifski(unlist(png_files), 
#        output_gif,
#        width = 1800, 
#        height = 1200, 
#        delay = 0.1)
# 
# # Clean up
# unlink(tmp_dir, recursive = TRUE)
# 
# # Reset parallel plan
# plan(sequential)
# 
# message("\nSuccessfully created combined animation:")
# message("- ", output_gif)
```

## Great Plains

```{r}
# #| include: false
# 
# # Set up parallel processing
# plan(multisession, workers = availableCores() - 1)  # Leave one core free
# 
# # Define the watersheds to include
# selected_watersheds <- c("Kings Creek", "Shane Creek", "Youngmeyer")
# 
# # First, ensure all watersheds have the same DOY range
# all_days <- daily_map |> 
#   st_drop_geometry() |> 
#   mutate(
#     DateLabel = as.Date(DOY, origin = as.Date("1999-12-31")),  # Adjust origin year as needed
#     MonthDay = format(DateLabel, "%B %d")
#   ) |> 
#   distinct(DOY, DateLabel, MonthDay) |> 
#   arrange(DOY)
# 
# # Create a temporary directory for frames
# tmp_dir <- tempfile("combined_frames_")
# dir.create(tmp_dir)
# 
# # Get all unique sites for each selected watershed
# watershed_sites <- daily_map |> 
#   st_drop_geometry() |> 
#   filter(watershed %in% selected_watersheds) |>
#   distinct(watershed, siteId) |> 
#   group_by(watershed) |> 
#   summarise(sites = list(siteId), .groups = "drop")
# 
# # Function to create a single combined frame with one shared legend
# create_single_frame <- function(i, all_days, daily_map, allStreams, watershed_sites, tmp_dir) {
#   library(tidyverse)
#   library(sf)
#   library(patchwork)
#   library(grid)
#   
#   current_day <- all_days$DOY[i]
#   day_label <- all_days$MonthDay[i]
#   
#   day_data <- daily_map |> 
#     filter(DOY == current_day, watershed %in% selected_watersheds)
#   
#   # Create a list of plots for each selected watershed
#   plot_list <- map(watershed_sites$watershed, function(ws) {
#     ws_day_data <- day_data |> 
#       filter(watershed == ws) |> 
#       complete(siteId = watershed_sites$sites[[which(watershed_sites$watershed == ws)]]) |> 
#       sf::st_as_sf()
#     
#     ws_stream <- allStreams |> 
#       filter(watershed == ws)
#     
#     ggplot() +
#       geom_sf(data = ws_stream, color = "#0084A8", size = 0.8) +
#       geom_sf(data = ws_day_data |> filter(!is.na(wet_dry)),
#               aes(color = wet_dry), size = 3, show.legend = TRUE) +
#       geom_sf(data = ws_day_data |> filter(is.na(wet_dry)),
#               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "gray50") +
#       scale_color_manual(values = c("Dry" = "#D55E00", "Wet" = "#009E73"),
#                          drop = FALSE, name = "Status") +
#       labs(title = ws) +
#       theme_void() +
#       theme(
#         plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
#         legend.position = "none"
#       )
#   })
#   # Create a named list of plots
#   names(plot_list) <- watershed_sites$watershed
#   p1 <- plot_list[["Kings Creek"]] +
#   theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(1, 1, 1, 1, unit = "pt"))
# p2 <- plot_list[["Shane Creek"]] +
#   theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(1, 1, 1, 1, unit = "pt"))
# p3 <- plot_list[["Youngmeyer"]] +
#   theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(1, 1, 1, 1, unit = "pt"))
#   
#   # Combine plots with reduced spacing
#   combined_plot <- (
#     p1 | (p2 / p3 + plot_layout(guides = "auto", heights = c(1, 1)))
#   ) +
#     plot_layout(
#       guides = "collect",
#       widths = c(1, 1),
#       design = NULL
#     ) +
#     plot_annotation(
#       subtitle = day_label,
#       theme = theme(
#         plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
#         legend.position = "bottom",
#         legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
#         legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
#         plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(2, 2, 2, 2, unit = "pt")  # Global margin
#       )
#     )
#   
#   # Save the frame
#   png_file <- file.path(tmp_dir, sprintf("frame_%03d.png", i))
#   ggsave(png_file, combined_plot, width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 310, units = "in")
#   
#   return(png_file)
# }
# 
# # Generate all frames in parallel with progress bar
# message("Creating combined frames in parallel...")
# png_files <- suppressWarnings(future_map(seq_len(nrow(all_days)),
#                                          ~create_single_frame(.x, all_days, daily_map, allStreams, watershed_sites, tmp_dir),
#                                          .options = furrr_options(
#                                            seed = TRUE,
#                                            packages = c("tidyverse", "sf", "patchwork", "ggthemes")
#                                          ),
#                                          .progress = TRUE)
# )
# 
# # Combine frames into GIF
# output_gif <- here("Figs/STICs/gifs/gpSheds.gif")
# gifski::gifski(unlist(png_files), 
#                output_gif,
#                width = 1200, 
#                height = 1200,
#                delay = 0.1)
# 
# # Clean up
# unlink(tmp_dir, recursive = TRUE)
# 
# # Reset parallel plan
# plan(sequential)
# 
# message("\nSuccessfully created combined animation:")
# message("- ", output_gif)

```

# Check streamDAG coords and lengths

```{r}
data(kon_coords)
kon_coords <- kon_coords |>
  mutate(Object.ID = sub("_[0-9]+$", "", Object.ID),
         watershed = "KNZ") |> 
  dplyr::rename(siteId = Object.ID) |> 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4326, remove = F) |> 
  st_transform(crs = 26914) 

data("kon_lengths")
kon_lengths <- kon_lengths |>
  within(Arcs <- gsub("(_[0-9]+)(?=->|$)", "", Arcs, perl = TRUE)) |> 
  separate(Arcs, into = c("from", "to"), sep = "->") |> 
  rename(streamDAG_lengths = Lengths)


kon_full <- streamDAGs("konza_full") |>
  set_vertex_attr("name", value = sub("_[0-9]+$", "", V(kon_full)$name))

knzCoords <- allSites |> 
  filter(watershed == "KNZ") |> 
  st_transform(crs = 26914)
knzLengths <- all_arc_lengths[["KNZ"]] |> 
  select(-watershed) |> 
  separate(Arc, into = c("from", "to"), sep = "->") |> 
  mutate(
    from = trimws(from),
    to   = trimws(to),
    Length_km = Length/1000
  ) |> 
  select(-Length) |> 
  rename(Con_length_km = Length_km)

compLength <- kon_lengths |> 
  left_join(knzLengths) |> 
  mutate(diff_m = (Con_length_km - streamDAG_lengths)*1000,
         Arc = paste(from, to, sep = "->")) 
ggplot(compLength, aes(x = Arc, y = diff_m)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  labs(x = "Segment", y = "Difference (m)") +
  theme_few()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) -> p
p
ggsave(filename = "arcDif_2.png", plot = p,
         path = "~/Desktop/", device = "png", create.dir = TRUE,
         width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

spatial.plot.sf(kon_coords$long, kon_coords$lat, kon_coords$siteId, shapefile = allStreams |> filter(watershed == "KNZ")) +
  labs(title = "streamDAG")
spatial.plot.sf(knzCoords$lon, knzCoords$lat, knzCoords$siteId, shapefile = allStreams |> filter(watershed == "KNZ")) +
  labs(title = "Connor")


kon_coords_length <- get_watershed_lengths("KNZ", kon_coords, allStreams) 

```

```{r}
# Subset data
knz_sites <- allSites |> filter(watershed == "KNZ") |> 
  st_transform(26914)
knz_streams <- allStreams |> filter(watershed == "KNZ") |> 
  st_transform(26914)
knzLengths <- all_arc_lengths[["KNZ"]] |> 
  select(-watershed) |> 
  separate(Arc, into = c("from", "to"), sep = "->") |> 
  mutate(
    from = trimws(from),
    to   = trimws(to),
    Length_km = Length/1000
  ) |> 
  select(-Length) |> 
  rename(Con_length_km = Length_km)
knz_presAbs <- nestPresAbs_filled |> 
  unnest(cols = c(data)) |>
  select(
    c("watershed", "date"),
    any_of(knz_sites$siteId)
  )

# Build network
sites <- tribble(
  ~from,   ~to,
  "04M13", "04M12",
  "04M12", "04M11",
  "04M11", "04M10",
  "04M10", "04M09",
  "04M09", "04M08",
  "04T02", "04M08",
  "04M08", "04M07",
  "04M07", "04M06",
  "04T01", "04M06",
  "04M06", "04M05",
  "04M05", "04M04",
  "04M04", "04M03",
  "04M03", "04M02",
  "04M02", "04M01",
  "04M01", "SFM02",
  "04W04", "04W03",
  "04W03", "04W02",
  "04W02", "04W01",
  "04W01", "04M01",
  "02M11", "02M10",
  "02M10", "02M09",
  "02M09", "02M08",
  "02M08", "02M07",
  "02M07", "02M06",
  "02M06", "02M05",
  "02M05", "02M04",
  "02M04", "02M03",
  "02M03", "02M02",
  "02M02", "02M01",
  "02M01", "SFM01",
  "20M05", "20M04",
  "20M04", "20M03",
  "20M03", "20M02",
  "20M02", "20M01",
  "20M01", "SFM07",
  "01M06", "01M05",
  "01M05", "01M04",
  "01M04", "01M03",
  "01M03", "01M02",
  "01M02", "01M01",
  "01M01", "SFM07",
  "SFM07", "SFM06",
  "SFM06", "SFM05",
  "SFT02", "SFM05",
  "SFM05", "SFM04",
  "SFM04", "SFM03",
  "SFT01", "SFM03",
  "SFM03", "SFM02",
  "SFM02", "SFM01"
)
knz_nodes <- knz_sites |>
  dplyr::mutate(siteId = as.character(siteId)) |>
  dplyr::distinct(siteId, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Build the sfnetwork
knz_net <- sfnetwork(
  nodes = knz_nodes,
  edges = edges,
  node_key = "siteId",
  directed = TRUE
)
plot(knz_net)

knz_net <- as_sfnetwork(knz_streams, directed = TRUE) |> 
  st_network_blend(knz_sites) |> 
  activate("edges") |> 
  mutate(weight = st_length(geom))
plot(knz_net)
# Pull node data to get siteId info
node_data <- knz_net |> 
  activate("nodes") |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  mutate(node_id = row_number()) |> 
  st_drop_geometry()

# Pull edge data and add from/to node siteIds
edge_data <- knz_net |> 
  activate("edges") |> 
  as_tibble() |>
  mutate(edge_id = row_number()) |>
  left_join(node_data |> select(from = node_id, siteId_from = siteId), by = "from") |>
  left_join(node_data |> select(to = node_id, siteId_to = siteId), by = "to")

# Get edge geometries and compute length
edge_geom <- knz_net |> 
  activate("edges") |> 
  st_geometry()

edge_data <- edge_data |> 
  mutate(length_m = st_length(edge_geom) |> as.numeric(),
         weight = ifelse(!is.na(siteId_from) & !is.na(siteId_to), length_m, NA_real_))

# Add the weights back into the sfnetwork
knz_net <- knz_net |> 
  activate("edges") |> 
  mutate(weight = edge_data$weight) |> 
  activate("nodes") |> 
  mutate(is_terminal = node_is_leaf(),
         has_siteId = !is.na(siteId)) |>
  filter(!(is_terminal & !has_siteId)) |>
  select(-is_terminal, -has_siteId) |> 
  activate("nodes") |> 
  mutate(is_terminal = node_is_leaf(),
         has_siteId = !is.na(siteId)) |>
  filter(!(is_terminal & !has_siteId)) |>
  select(-is_terminal, -has_siteId) |> 
  filter(!(node_is_root() & is.na(siteId)))




tm_shape(knz_net |> activate(edges) |> as_tibble() |> st_as_sf()) +
  tm_lines() +
tm_shape(knz_net |> activate(nodes) |> as_tibble() |> st_as_sf()) +
  tm_dots(size = 0.5, fill = "red") +
    tm_basemap("Esri.WorldImagery")+
  tmap_mode("view")

day_i <- knz_presAbs[1,]
# Get vector of site IDs with a value of 0 on that day
sites_to_remove <- day_i |>
  select(-watershed, -date) |>
  purrr::keep(~ .x == "0") |>
  names()

# Remove those nodes from the network
knz_net_subset <- knz_net |>
  activate("nodes") |>
  filter(!(siteId %in% sites_to_remove)) |> 
  mutate(is_terminal = node_is_leaf(),
         has_siteId = !is.na(siteId),
         is_sink = node_is_sink())

library(tmap)
tm_shape(knz_net_subset |> activate(edges) |> as_tibble() |> st_as_sf()) +
  tm_lines() +
tm_shape(knz_net_subset |> activate(nodes) |> as_tibble() |> st_as_sf()) +
  tm_dots(size = 0.5, fill = "red") +
    tm_basemap("Esri.WorldImagery")+
  tmap_mode("view")



plot(knznet)
# Extract coordinates from node geometries
coords <- knz_net_subset |> 
  sf::st_as_sf() |>
  sf::st_coordinates() |>
  as.data.frame()

# Combine coordinates with node data for manual layout
layout_df <- knz_net_subset |> 
  sf::st_as_sf() |> 
  dplyr::mutate(x = coords$X, y = coords$Y)

# Now plot using ggraph with manual layout
ggraph(knz_net_subset, layout = "manual", x = layout_df$x, y = layout_df$y) +
  geom_edge_link(
    edge_width = 0.8,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(4, "mm")), 
    end_cap = circle(3, 'mm')
  ) +
  geom_node_point(color = "black") +
  geom_node_text(aes(label = siteId), size = 2.5, repel = TRUE) +
  theme_void()
```
